meaning: n.合伙人,股东,舞伴,伴侣vt.与...合伙,组成一对vi.做伙伴,当助手
examples: Gerry offered to partner me at tennis.
He did not dally over the choice of a partner.
He is now co-partner in a new property company.
Police later raided the flat just before Nesbitt and his partner were going to bed.
They were also more skeptical that further dialogue with their partner would yield a close friendship.
